creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Host: FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT #84 r356991: Wed Jan 22 20:29:28 CET 2020 amd64, ports tree at 523835, updating/upgrading the local ports via traditional make/portmaster fails with the error shown below:
